mission.title: knative-eventing: Moving Placeable type and new Scheduler to eventing core
mission.description:
Fixes https://github.com/knative-sandbox/eventing-kafka/issues/925

## Proposed Changes

- :gift: Controller reads and validates the policy profile (containing predicates and priorities) for both scheduling and descheduling from ConfigMaps.
- :gift: Scheduler imports all the available plugins which invokes their init() and registers all the core and source specific (kafka) plugins.
- :gift: Scheduler runs all the predicates and priorities specified in the policy (configmap) file to eliminate all

steps.title: Review the fix
